+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Ollama Windows version",
+    "description": "Ollama Windows version. Requested by 33+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ollama version and configuration:\n```bash\nollama --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working ollama installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ollama configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant ollama configuration:\nI saw it is coming but didn't mention when? Would be great if you pinned this issue as more people use Windows & ollama has such a great dx.\n\nThe project looks absolutely brilliant. Would love to use text (gpt-4) & code (copilot) locally."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ollama Windows version",
+        "description": "Fix #403 \n- Support cuda build in Windows\n- Import \"containerd/console\" lib to support colorful output in Windows terminal\n```yaml\nscoop install go cmake gcc\nset CGO_ENABLED=\"1\"\ngit clone https://github.com/jmorganca/ollama.git\ngo generate ./...\ngo build .\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Ollama Windows version\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fix #403 \n- Support cuda build in Windows\n- Import \"containerd/console\" lib to support colorful output in Windows terminal",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "scoop install go cmake gcc\nset CGO_ENABLED=\"1\"\ngit clone https://github.com/jmorganca/ollama.git\ngo generate ./...\ngo build ."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
